seo.title: Fumo Spots
seo.description: Touhou Project fans can share fumo photos taken around the world and connect each trip on one map.

workbench.title: Open a marker or start a new post.
workbench.description: The map stays for browsing. Actions stay here.
workbench.posterExplore: Browse fumo photos from around the world

browse.title: Browse by zoom
browse.body: Zoom out for distribution. Zoom in for thumbnails.

publicLocation.title: Public precision
publicLocation.body: Only the public point is shown on the map, not the exact shooting point.

submission.title: Each post
submission.body: Photo, place, author ID, and note.

map.visibleCount: {count} published photo(s) are visible in this view
map.helper: Pan or zoom to reload the current viewport, then click a marker to open details on the right.

auth.title: Log in to submit.
auth.description: Use a password, GitHub, or an email link.
auth.hint: After login, you will return to the thing you were trying to open. If there is no explicit target, the submit panel opens by default.
auth.magicLinkSuccess: The login link has been sent to your inbox. Open it and you will come back to this site to continue.
auth.registrationNeedsConfirmation: Registration is submitted. Open the confirmation link in your email before logging in.
auth.success: The login link has been sent to your inbox. Open it and you will come back to this site to continue.

password.title: Log in with password
password.description: Use your registered email and password

link.title: Log in with an email link
link.description: Registered accounts can enter through an email link

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
errors.linkFailed: Failed to send the login link.
errors.sendFailed: Failed to send the login link.

onboarding.title: Set the author ID shown on public posts.
onboarding.description: This ID appears on every public post.
onboarding.label: Author ID

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save the author ID.

post.loadingDescription: The right panel will show the full image, public location, and the author's note.
post.authorNoteFallback: The author did not leave an extra note.
post.locationDetailFallback: No more detailed region information was provided.
post.unavailableTitle: This post is not available right now
post.unavailableDescription: It may still be under review, or the link may no longer be valid.

errors.loginToLike: Log in to like this post.
errors.likeFailed: Failed to update like. Please try again.

submit.title: Upload photos
submit.description: Only the public point appears on the public site.
submit.photoSectionDescription: If the image contains EXIF coordinates or capture time, the app will try to read them automatically. Without EXIF, you can still place the point manually on the map.
submit.titlePlaceholder: Example: Tenshi at Yellow Crane Tower
submit.bodyPlaceholder: Write a short note about where the photo was taken or what happened during this fumo trip.
submit.locationSectionDescription: Click on the map to set the exact point. If you choose approximate sharing, drag the blue marker to adjust the public point.
submit.success: Your submission is in. It will appear on the public map after an admin approves it.

errors.cannotCreateThumbnailCanvas: Could not create the thumbnail canvas.
errors.selectPhoto: Please choose at least one photo to submit.
errors.tooManyPhotos: You can submit up to {max} photos.
errors.exactRequired: Please mark the exact shooting location on the map first.
errors.publicRequired: Please confirm the public location first.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.

edit.title: Edit this post.
edit.description: Changes are reviewed before they replace the public version.
edit.success: Your edit is in review. The public version stays visible until approval.
